pr.title: Support KOTS-managed Jira DC service accounts
pr.body:
## Summary
- Add Jira DC service-account env support via `JIRA_DC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL` and `JIRA_DC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PAT`.
- Prefer env-managed credentials at runtime while preserving per-workspace credentials for SaaS/non-managed installs.
- Stop serializing decrypted Jira DC PATs into V1 callback processors; resolve the effective token at callback time instead.
- Hide in-app service-account entry when OpenHands Enterprise/KOTS service-account values are configured, and surface partial env config errors.

## Tests
- `uv run ruff check enterprise/server/routes/integration/jira_dc.py enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_service_account.py enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_v1_callback_processor.py enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_view.py openhands/app_server/web_client/default_web_client_config_injector.py openhands/app_server/web_client/web_client_models.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_service_account.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_v1_callback_processor.py enterprise/tests/unit/server/routes/test_jira_dc_integration_routes.py`
- `PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run --with python-keycloak --with limits --with coredis pytest enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_service_account.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_v1_callback_processor.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_view.py enterprise/tests/unit/server/routes/test_jira_dc_integration_routes.py`
- `npm run typecheck:staged && npm run check-translation-completeness`

---

To run this PR locally, use the following command:

GUI with Docker:
```
docker run -it --rm   -p 3000:3000   -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock   --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway   --name openhands-app-bd8c472   docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:bd8c472
```
pr.author: ak684
